entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop variety being studied for character association and path analysis.

entities.name: HILL COUNT
entities.description: The number of hills per unit area.

entities.name: BLOOM
entities.description: The flowering stage or characteristic of the plant.

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical measurement of the sorghum plant.

entities.name: PANICLE COUNT
entities.description: The number of panicles per plant.

entities.name: 1000 SEED MASS
entities.description: The mass of 1000 seeds or grains.

entities.name: HEAD WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of the sorghum head.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of grain produced.

entities.name: ASSOCIATION ANALYSIS
entities.description: Statistical method used to study the relationship between different characters.

entities.name: PATH ANALYSIS
entities.description: Statistical method used to partition correlation into direct and indirect effects.

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC CORRELATION
entities.description: Correlation based on the observable characteristics of the plant.

entities.name: GENOTYPIC CORRELATION
entities.description: Correlation based on the genetic makeup of the plant.
